title: mypy: 8 func-returns-value errors (returning None when declared otherwise)
description:
8 func-returns-value errors where functions declared to return a value only return None:
- src/lichen/interface/kiss/handler.py: lines 120, 122, 124, 126, 128, 130, 132 (_handle_data, _handle_txdelay, _handle_persistence, _handle_slottime, _handle_txtail, _handle_fullduplex, _handle_return)
- src/lichen/interface/handler.py: line 71 (_handle_log_subscribe)

Fix: Either update return type to -> None, or implement the return value as expected.
